name: yandex-direct-api
description: Full Yandex Direct API v5 with your own OAuth token via the mcp-yandex-direct npm server: statistics, keywords, bids, budgets — including write tools behind explicit confirmation. Requires Node.js 18+.

token.title: Yandex Direct OAuth token
token.description: OAuth token with Yandex Direct API access — see github.com/askads/mcp-yandex-direct for how to get one

client_login.title: Client login (agencies only)
client_login.description: Managed client login for agency tokens; leave empty for a regular advertiser account
